features: Detangler Brush: Thanks to the elastic design and the gentle curve of the back, the detangler brush fits more closely to the curve of the head when combing hair. The nylon brush head prevents frizz and removes split ends, the comfortable round head design can massage the scalp better, increasing circulation and helping healthy hair growth.The hair brush doesn't generate static electricity

Faster Blow Drying: The vents in the hair drying brush help dissipate heat, reduce blow dry time by 48% and prevent heat damage from the hair dryer, helping you minimize breakage and hair loss, wet and dry more convenient. Enough long and elastic bristles glide through tangles with ease, with 45% less breakage and 55% less effort for 100% happier hair

Luxury Handle: Our detangling brush feature a metal-infused handle that adds weight and ensures a luxuriously chunky feel, while the textured surface of the handle ensures a firm grip and excellent control, making styling and grooming a breeze

Multi Styling: The ventilated styling brush is suitable for different hair lengths, no matter your hair is curly, straight or other hair types, it is also perfect for keeping your wigs or even hair extensions in good condition. This comb can be used by men, women and children. Suitable for hairdressing salon and daily use. Brushing through your hair is easy and enjoyable with this dry-wet hair brush

Perfect Gift: SHINLEA detangle hair brush is the perfect gift for friends and family, loved ones and children as well as for the holidays. SHINLEA is committed to providing you with good products at good prices, so that everyone can enjoy the good life. If you have any questions about our hair brush, please do not hesitate to contact us. We will do our best to serve you
